summary.key_observation: Optimization with metadata queries shows significant precision improvement at higher k values, enabling better ranking of relevant documents in larger result sets.
summary.note: Recall decreased slightly due to increased selectivity, indicating the system is more precise but may miss some relevant documents. This trade-off is often desirable for high-precision retrieval scenarios. The metadata-aware hybrid scoring successfully surfaces more relevant documents in top positions (precision@k gains) while maintaining same precision@1.
